notes: Non-secret probe results for V-383. No prompt/response bodies, headers, or credentials are stored. Reproduce with the commands in docs/gpt-5.6-sol-context.md.

capture.description: Proof Claude Code strips the [1m] suffix client-side. A disposable loopback Anthropic-API server received the request; the wire model id had no suffix.

contextWindow.description: Claude Code's own per-session budget for the [1m] session, read programmatically from modelUsage in `claude --print --output-format json` (NOT the /context display).

live.description: Proof the Codex OAuth / CLIProxy route accepts a single request past the 200K gateway floor. A deterministic filler prompt was sent through the normal router; the model returned the sentinel and reported input usage far above 200K, with no truncation or context-length error.
